instruction: In Finder, compress the folder ~/Documents/{FOLDER} into a zip archive named {FOLDER}.zip in the same directory.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5); Tier-A exec confirms the archive exists and lists the expected entry

args: test -f "$HOME/Documents/{FOLDER}.zip" && unzip -l "$HOME/Documents/{FOLDER}.zip" 2>/dev/null | grep -o 'a.txt' | head -1 || echo missing
